title: Replace placeholder header banner with uploaded image

requirements.text: Replace the placeholder header banner image in the BrandingBanner component with the user's uploaded custom banner image, rendering it as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated

quotes: Can we replace the placeholder header at the top?

acceptanceCriteria: The BrandingBanner component displays the custom banner image instead of the placeholder
The banner image is loaded from a static asset path in frontend/public/assets/generated
The banner maintains proper aspect ratio and responsive sizing
No placeholder or default banner is visible after the change

constraints: Do not modify Internet Identity integration files
Do not edit read-only UI component sources in frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the banner's layout or positioning
Adding animation or transition effects to the banner
Modifying other header components beyond the banner image

required: Custom header banner image for SPEAKR audio platform with modern, professional design (header-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
